name: Quick Peanut Butter Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the peanut butter with 2 tablespoons of powdered milk.
2. Add the raisins, graham crackers, vanilla extract, and cinnamon to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper, forming 1-inch balls.
4. Place the balls in the freezer until ready to serve.
